reference: THE KICK HE HAD RECEIVED WAS A FORETASTE OF WHAT HE MIGHT EXPECT AND AFTER A LITTLE CONSIDERATION HE CAME TO THE CONCLUSION THAT HIS DUTY WAS TO ESCAPE AND GET BACK TO THE CUTTER AS QUICKLY AS HE COULD
text: The kick he had received was a foretaste of what he might expect, and after a little consideration he came to the conclusion that his duty was to escape and get back to the cutter as quickly as he could.
